response.body:
{
"blend":"{{random 'Coffee.blendName'}}",
"name":"{{random 'Beer.name'}}",
"ingredient":"{{random 'Food.ingredient'}}",
"genre":"{{random 'Music.genre'}}",
"author":"{{random 'Book.author'}}",
"title":"{{random 'Book.title'}}",
"url":"{{request.url}}",
"path":"{{request.path}}",
"pathsegment":"{{request.pathSegments.[0]}}",
"paramName":"{{request.query.paramName}}",
"method":"{{request.method}}",
"nody":"{{request.body}}",
"jsonpath":"{{jsonPath request.body '$.message'}}",
"clientIp":"{{request.clientIp}}",
"now":"{{now}}",
"baseUrl":"{{request.baseUrl}}",
"now2":"{{now format='yyyy-MM-dd'}}",
"uuid":"{{randomValue type='UUID'}}",
"ALPHANUMERIC":"{{randomValue type='ALPHANUMERIC' length=16}}",
"NUMERIC":"{{randomValue type='NUMERIC' length=8}}",
"randomInt":"{{randomInt lower=1 upper=100}}",
"math":"{{math 1 '+' 1}}",
"first_name":"{{random 'Name.firstName'}}",
"last_name":"{{random 'Name.lastName'}}",
"full_name":"{{random 'Name.fullName'}}",
"name_with_middle":"{{random 'Name.nameWithMiddle'}}",
"prefix":"{{random 'Name.prefix'}}",
"suffix":"{{random 'Name.suffix'}}",
"email_address":"{{random 'Internet.emailAddress'}}",
"safe_email_address":"{{random 'Internet.safeEmailAddress'}}",
"url2":"{{random 'Internet.url'}}",
"domain_name":"{{random 'Internet.domainName'}}",
"ip_v4_address":"{{random 'Internet.ipV4Address'}}",
"ip_v6_address":"{{random 'Internet.ipV6Address'}}",
"mac_address":"{{random 'Internet.macAddress'}}",
"uuid2":"{{random 'Internet.uuid'}}",
"password":"{{random 'Internet.password'}}",
"phone_number":"{{random 'PhoneNumber.phoneNumber'}}",
"cell_phone":"{{random 'PhoneNumber.cellPhone'}}",
"street_address":"{{random 'Address.streetAddress'}}",
"city":"{{random 'Address.city'}}",
"state":"{{random 'Address.state'}}",
"state_abbr":"{{random 'Address.stateAbbr'}}",
"zip_code":"{{random 'Address.zipCode'}}",
"country":"{{random 'Address.country'}}",
"latitude":"{{random 'Address.latitude'}}",
"longitude":"{{random 'Address.longitude'}}",
"company":"{{random 'Company.name'}}",
"industry":"{{random 'Company.industry'}}",
"bs":"{{random 'Company.bs'}}",
"jobTitle":"{{random 'Job.title'}}",
"field":"{{random 'Job.field'}}",
"department":"{{random 'Commerce.department'}}",
"product_name":"{{random 'Commerce.productName'}}",
"price":"{{random 'Commerce.price'}}",
"credit_card":"{{random 'Finance.creditCard'}}",
"iban":"{{random 'Finance.iban'}}",
"bic":"{{random 'Finance.bic'}}",
"birthday":"{{random 'DateAndTime.birthday'}}",
"future":"{{random 'TimeAndDate.future'}}",
"past":"{{random 'TimeAndDate.past'}}",
"word":"{{random 'Lorem.word'}}",
"sentence":"{{random 'Lorem.sentence'}}",
"paragraph":"{{random 'Lorem.paragraph'}}",
"characters":"{{random 'Lorem.characters'}}",
"ean13":"{{random 'Barcode.ean13'}}",
"ean8":"{{random 'Barcode.ean8'}}",
"isbn10":"{{random 'Code.isbn10'}}",
"isbn13":"{{random 'Code.isbn13'}}"
}
